title: T-006 — stock_moves table migration
prompt:
# T-006 — stock_moves table migration

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §5.6, §8.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Create `stock_moves` table per PRD §5.6 covering all move_types (transfer/putaway/issue/receipt/adjustment/return/quarantine/consume_to_wo).

## Implementation contract
Add `packages/db/src/schema/stock-moves.ts` with columns: id, tenant_id, move_number (auto SM-YYYY-NNNNN), lp_id FK, move_type ENUM (8 values per §8.1), from_location_id (nullable for putaway), to_location_id, quantity (decimal(14,4)), catch_weight_kg, move_date, status ENUM ('completed','cancelled') default 'completed', reason_code (varchar 32), reason_text, wo_id, reference_type (varchar 32), reference_id (uuid), created_at, created_by.
Constraints: CHECK (quantity > 0); UNIQUE(tenant_id, move_number).

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/src/schema/stock-moves.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_stock_moves.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/stock-moves.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the migration runs, when stock_moves is inspected, then all PRD §5.6 columns and the 8-value move_type enum exist.
2. Given INSERT with quantity=0, when committed, then DB raises a CHECK violation.
3. Given two rows share (tenant_id, move_number), when the second commits, then DB raises a unique violation.

## Test strategy
- RED: stock-moves.test.ts checks enum membership, CHECK qty, UNIQUE.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test stock-moves`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow move_type values outside §8.1.
- Do not auto-cascade-delete via stock_moves (audit-preserving).
- Do not implement service logic.

pipeline_inputs.description: Create stock_moves table with the 8 move-types enum per §5.6 + §8.1.
pipeline_inputs.details: Drizzle schema + migration. CHECK quantity > 0; UNIQUE(tenant_id, move_number); from_location_id nullable for putaway/receipt. Audit-preserving design (no soft delete cascade).
